_invariant: Real Elixir deUSD exposure graph at the 2025-11-06 redemption-run trough. Token address/decimals/totalSupply/supply_samples are REAL on-chain Alchemy archive reads (deUSD 0x1570…a138; MEASURED re-capture 2026-06-07). supply_samples is the actual chronological totalSupply series at blocks [23572225, 23618671, 23668638, 23697195, 23720447, 23732958, 23740100] (2025-10-13..2025-11-06): a run-up 120.83M->150.41M->154.02M (Oct13->Oct27->Oct31) then a sharp redemption collapse 154.02M->144.21M->104.44M->92.00M (Oct31->Nov03->Nov05->Nov06). MEASURED one-step contraction baseline(144.21M)->trough(92.00M) = -36.20%; peak(154.02M)->trough = -40.27%. The depeg price (~$0.015) is injected per-case via peg_probes, not stored on the edge — it is an OFF-CHAIN/CEX secondary-market intraday low (reports $0.015-$0.03), NOT an on-chain protocol-oracle reading at this block, so it stays ASSERTED (measured=false). One isolated Morpho-style lending market with a MARKET (depeg-sensitive) oracle is the liquidation venue.

meta.data_source: on-chain Alchemy archive (deUSD 0x15700B564Ca08D9439C58cA5053166E8317aa138 totalSupply @ blocks 23572225,23618671,23668638,23697195,23720447,23732958,23740100; MEASURED re-capture 2026-06-07) + Stream/Elixir contagion post-mortems (Yahoo/Cryptopolitan/BeInCrypto/BlockEden/FXStreet)

metadata._note: Stream Finance ~$93M external-manager loss (Nov 4) impaired deUSD's ~$68M (~65%) Stream backing; ~80% of holders ran for redemptions (burn-on-redeem) and totalSupply collapsed from a 154.02M Oct-31 peak to 92.00M by Nov-06. supply_samples are MEASURED on-chain totalSupply() reads at the listed blocks (re-capture 2026-06-07). The collapse delta is a CONTRACTION, not a mint: one-step baseline(144.21M, block 23720447)->trough(92.00M, block 23740100) = -36.20%; peak(154.02M)->trough = -40.27%.

deUSD was used as isolated-market collateral across Morpho/Euler/Silo; modeled here as one representative isolated Morpho Blue deUSD/USDC market with a market-price (depeg-sensitive) oracle. The edge amounts (40M exposure / utilization 0.85) are MODELED representative figures (measured=false) — this event's spine is the supply-collapse + depeg, not a measured per-market util read.
